accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and contextual details (PL number, statute amended) are correct.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all statements align with the bill text and accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill reauthorizes and modifies DoD authority to sell aircraft for wildfire suppression.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Identifies the amended statute and describes the specific changes made.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the use restriction limiting aircraft to wildfire suppression services.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the authority period begins June 12, 2025 and ends October 1, 2035.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the water addition, use restriction, cross-reference fix, and new period.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, descriptive tone with no editorializing.

concise.why: Compact with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Department of Defense and the Wildfire Suppression Aircraft Transfer Act of 1996.

correct_figures.why: Dates (June 12, 2025; October 1, 2035; April 8; June 3) are all accurate.
